title: Squirrel Removal in Yorktown Heights, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Yorktown Heights, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Yorktown Heights. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Yorktown Heights, where wooded residential properties and historic homes provide ideal nesting opportunities in attics, chimneys, and soffits. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Yorktown Heights and surrounding Westchester communities, combining humane trapping with permanent exclusion solutions. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges posed by the area's mature trees and varied architecture.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife control experience to Yorktown Heights, with certified technicians who specialize in humane squirrel removal and long-term prevention. We offer same-day emergency service, lifetime warranties on exclusion work, and transparent pricing with no hidden fees for our Westchester County customers.
localContext: Yorktown Heights' blend of Colonial-era homes, mid-century ranches, and newer developments near the Taconic State Parkway creates diverse entry points for squirrels seeking shelter. Properties near Franklin D. Roosevelt State Park and the wooded areas around Shrub Oak are particularly susceptible to gray squirrel and flying squirrel intrusions, especially during fall and spring nesting seasons.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Yorktown Heights?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Yorktown Heights typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. This includes inspection, humane trapping, entry point sealing, and sanitation. We provide free estimates with detailed pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Yorktown Heights attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the morning and evening, particularly in attics or walls, visible damage to roof vents or fascia boards, chewed wiring or insulation, droppings near entry points, and squirrel sightings on your roof. Yorktown Heights homeowners often notice increased activity during spring (April-May) and fall (September-October) nesting seasons.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in Westchester County?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New York State Department of Environmental Conservation regulations for humane squirrel removal. Our methods include live trapping and relocation when permitted, one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to leave but not return, and sealing entry points only after ensuring no babies are trapped inside. We never use harmful poisons or inhumane methods.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Yorktown Heights home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service for Yorktown Heights residents and can typically begin trapping within 24 hours of your call. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels, though exclusion and repair work may take 1-2 weeks for extensive infestations. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your free inspection.
